final:
module RefModule(
    input clk,
    input reset,
    input enable,
    output reg [n-1:0] count
);parameter n = 4; // Change to desired number of bits

  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
    if (reset) begin
        count <= 0;
    end else if (enable) begin
        count <= count + 1;
    end
end

endmodule
